summary: The diff implements most of the required image replacements across KitchenUtensils.tsx, HouseholdProducts.tsx, ProductCategories.tsx, and adds a new FeaturedProducts.tsx component. However, REQ-37 (Photo Gallery) uses non-generated /assets/IMG-*.jpg paths for 6 of its items, REQ-38 (HeroSection.tsx) shows no modification in the diff, and several FeaturedProducts image filenames do not exactly match the required spec filenames.

missing_requirements.requirement: In HeroSection.tsx, replace the broken or missing hero product image with the newly generated hero image asset in frontend/public/assets/generated/.
missing_requirements.reason: HeroSection.tsx does not appear in the modified files list. No evidence that the hero product image was updated to point to frontend/public/assets/generated/.

missing_requirements.requirement: In the Photo Gallery section, replace all broken or missing gallery images with the newly generated static image assets in frontend/public/assets/generated/. All 6 gallery grid items must display visible product or store images.
missing_requirements.reason: PhotoGallery.tsx contains 11 gallery items but the first 6 use paths like /assets/IMG-20260226-WA0019.jpg which are NOT under frontend/public/assets/generated/. Only items 7-11 use generated paths. The requirement specifies all gallery images must resolve to frontend/public/assets/generated/.

missing_requirements.requirement: Each of the 8 product cards must use image filenames exactly matching the generated asset filenames per the spec.
missing_requirements.reason: The spec requires filenames like product-steel-glass-set.dim_600x600.png, product-mixing-bowls-set.dim_600x600.png, product-vegetable-chopper.dim_600x600.png, product-stainless-steel-thali.dim_600x600.png. The diff uses different names and dimensions: product-glass-set.dim_400x400.png, product-mixing-bowls.dim_400x400.png, product-chopper.dim_400x400.png, product-thali.dim_400x400.png.

hallucinated_features.description: PhotoGallery.tsx was built with 11 gallery items instead of the required 6, with 6 items pointing to non-generated /assets/IMG-*.jpg paths outside of frontend/public/assets/generated/.
hallucinated_features.reason: The build request specifies exactly 6 gallery grid items all sourced from frontend/public/assets/generated/. The implementation has 11 items with 6 using non-generated image paths.
